recommendations.title: Miraculous: Ladybug & Cat Noir, The Movie
recommendations.overview: After a guardian of magical jewels turns an awkward girl and a popular boy into superheroes, they can never reveal their identities — even to each other.

recommendations.title: Ballad of a Small Player
recommendations.overview: Amid the glittering casinos of Macau, a gambler running from his past—and his debts—becomes fascinated by an enigmatic woman at the baccarat table.

recommendations.title: Ip Man: Kung Fu Master
recommendations.overview: Ip Man’s promising career as a Policeman is ruined after he is framed for murder and targeted by a mob boss’s daughter.

recommendations.title: The American Society of Magical Negroes
recommendations.overview: A young man, Aren, is recruited into a secret society of magical Black people who dedicate their lives to a cause of utmost importance: making white people’s lives easier.

recommendations.title: El Bola
recommendations.overview: El Bola  is a 12-year-old boy raised in a violent and sordid environment. Embarrassed by his family life, he avoids becoming close to classmates. The arrival of a new boy at school changes his attitude towards his classmates and friendship.
